judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent adherence to requirements with consistent snake_case naming and complete file coverage (all 80 files organized). The hierarchical logic is intuitive, grouping by file type then context (e.g., photos/personal/2024/), and the MANIFEST provides clear documentation. Minor deductions for quality due to the 'misc/' folder being a catch-all for diverse file types (configs and logs) and 'archives/' being somewhat flat compared to the 2-3 level depth of other categories.
